title: post apiassignmentsgenerate valid payload success
description: Verify that POST /api/assignments/generate with valid authorization and correct payload successfully generates an AI assignment and returns 201 with assignmentId and isAIGenerated true.

title: post apiassignmentsgenerate missing required field error
description: Verify that POST /api/assignments/generate with authorization but missing required fields returns 400 validation error and prevents assignment generation.

title: get apiassignments unauthorized access
description: Verify that GET /api/assignments without authorization returns 401 Unauthorized error.

title: post apiassignmentsgenerate ai provider error handling
description: Verify that POST /api/assignments/generate with valid payload but AI provider rate-limit or error returns 502 or 500 with 'AI provider error' message and client shows retry option.

title: post apisubmissions valid submission processing
description: Verify that POST /api/submissions with valid authorization and payload returns 201 with submissionId and status processing or completed, and subsequent GET /api/submissions/[id] returns evaluation results including percentageScore, aiFeedback, perQuestionFeedback, and evaluatedAt.

title: post apisubmissions invalid payload error
description: Verify that POST /api/submissions with authorization but missing answers or invalid answer format returns 400 validation error and prevents submission retry.

title: get apisubmissionsid unauthorized access
description: Verify that GET /api/submissions/[id] without authorization returns 401 Unauthorized error.

title: get apiprogressmastery authorized access
description: Verify that GET /api/progress/mastery with valid authorization returns 200 with topic mastery map including subtopics with mastery scores and color codes.

title: get apirecommendations authorized access
description: Verify that GET /api/recommendations with valid authorization returns 200 with a list of recommended topics and actions, and handles empty recommendations gracefully.

title: get apicurriculum public access
description: Verify that GET /api/curriculum without authorization returns 200 with the full curriculum tree including subjects, chapters, topics, and metadata for client rendering.
